# ZeroCard

> ZeroCard is a virtual crypto payment card powered by Pionex. Spend USDT worldwide, earn 1% cashback in crypto, and get up to 5% APR on your balance.

ZeroCard lets crypto holders pay for international services, subscriptions, travel, and online shopping in 200+ countries with no monthly fees and no bank account required. Setup takes about 5 minutes via Pionex.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, benefits, comparison, reviews, and FAQ.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles for crypto users, traders, freelancers, digital nomads, and more.

## Blog topics

- Crypto cards, USDT spending, stablecoin payments
- Pionex trading bots and integration with ZeroCard
- International payments, life abroad, digital nomad finance
- Freelancer and creator monetization with crypto
